hero_subtitle: SFTY connects fragmented market data, licensing records, and supervisory workflows into one secure, auditable platform built for regulators managing digital asset supervision.
trust_card_1_value: Market participants, licensing data and risk profiles
trust_card_2_value: Wallets, transactions and exposure across the market
trust_card_3_value: Originator and beneficiary data checked for completeness
trust_card_5_value: On-premise or private cloud for sensitive data
trust_card_6_value: Supervisory outputs, evidence and regulatory reports
problem_title: Supervision breaks when data is disconnected
problem_description: Regulators struggle to form a coherent view when critical digital asset data remains isolated across separate systems. This fragmentation hinders evidence preservation, complicates audit trails, and slows regulatory action on VASP and CASP activities.
problem_point_1_value: VASP activity, licensing data and risk signals remain scattered
problem_point_2_value: Alerts and investigations depend on disconnected manual processes
problem_point_3_value: Decisions are harder to explain without connected logs and case history
problem_point_4_value: Regulatory teams lack one shared operating layer for supervision
solution_description: SFTY connects fragmented market data, VASP profiles, licensing records, cases and evidence into a unified supervisory environment with controlled access and audit-ready workflows for institutional regulators.
workflow_title: From market signal to supervisory action
workflow_description: SFTY transforms diverse market signals into classified alerts, connected cases, reviewed evidence and documented supervisory actions within a secure regulatory workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: Wallet, VASP, Travel Rule or OSINT signal appears
workflow_step_2_description: SFTY classifies and routes the signal for review
workflow_step_3_description: A supervisory case opens with context & evidence
workflow_step_4_description: Teams record a decision, request or supervisory response
workflow_step_5_description: Evidence, actions and outcomes stay available for review
why_sfty_title: Not another analytics tool. One supervisory layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented market data, licensing, wallet activity, cases and evidence into a unified supervisory layer built for government-grade oversight and auditability.
why_sfty_card_1_description: See activity across VASPs, wallets, entities and risk signals
why_sfty_card_2_description: Connect participants, structures, links and supervisory records
why_sfty_card_3_description: Move from alerts to investigations, actions and reporting
why_sfty_card_4_description: Understand not only single risks, but the condition of the market
authority_description: SFTY provides a secure, auditable environment for regulators requiring controlled access, evidence-grade logging and procurement-ready deployment in government-grade supervisory settings.
authority_card_1_description: Deploy on-premise, in private cloud or inside a controlled government environment
authority_card_2_description: Preserve activity, decisions, case history and reporting evidence
authority_card_3_description: Control who can view, review, escalate and act across teams and agencies
authority_card_4_description: Support phased implementation, documentation, integrations and governance review
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY how supervisory workflows manage evidence and cases
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how supervisory records support regulatory decision history
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how secure access and audit logs preserve governance
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how multi-provider data connects in supervision workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for supervisory, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on VASP supervision, sovereign deployment, evidence logging and regulatory workflows.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for regulators and authorities?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a secure supervisory layer connecting VASP and CASP data, wallets, transactions, KYC, KYB, Travel Rule messages and cases for regulators and government authorities.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support supervisory workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures alerts, cases, decision logs and reporting workflows into a connected system supporting risk-based supervision and case management for regulated digital asset markets.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve supervisory evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence-grade logs including case history, decision records and provider outputs, enabling accountable supervisory reviews and audit readiness within regulated environments.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing provider data?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY orchestrates multiple KYT, KYC, KYB, Travel Rule and analytics providers by normalizing their outputs into a connected supervisory platform without replacing them.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing supervisory tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing tools by connecting fragmented data and provider outputs into structured supervisory workflows without replacing analytics or compliance systems.
final_description: Review how SFTY connects licensing data, market signals and case records into a secure supervisory operating layer.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
